mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHECKIN_GLUCOSE_DETAILS (CHECKIN_ID, GLUCOSE_VALUE, MEASURE_CONTEXT, UNIT) VALUES (#{checkinId}, #{glucoseValue}, #{measureContext}, #{unit})
mapper.select: SELECT d.CHECKIN_ID AS checkinId, d.GLUCOSE_VALUE AS glucoseValue, d.MEASURE_CONTEXT AS measureContext, d.UNIT AS unit, r.CHECKIN_DATE AS checkinDate, r.RECORD_TIME AS recordTime FROM CHECKIN_RECORDS r INNER JOIN CHECKIN_GLUCOSE_DETAILS d ON r.CHECKIN_ID = d.CHECKIN_ID WHERE r.USER_ID = #{userId} AND r.CHECKIN_TYPE = 4 AND r.CHECKIN_DATE = #{checkinDate} AND r.DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY r.RECORD_TIME DESC

SELECT d.CHECKIN_ID AS checkinId, d.GLUCOSE_VALUE AS glucoseValue, d.MEASURE_CONTEXT AS measureContext, d.UNIT AS unit, r.CHECKIN_DATE AS checkinDate, r.RECORD_TIME AS recordTime FROM CHECKIN_RECORDS r INNER JOIN CHECKIN_GLUCOSE_DETAILS d ON r.CHECKIN_ID = d.CHECKIN_ID WHERE r.USER_ID = #{userId} AND r.CHECKIN_TYPE = 4 AND r.CHECKIN_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND r.DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY r.RECORD_TIME ASC
